channel.title: Concurrency on Patrick Arvatu
channel.description: Recent content in Concurrency on Patrick Arvatu

item.title: Porting panama to C++: concurrency patterns from a channel
item.description: Porting Lambels/chanus (Rust) to C++20: mutex + condvar, the wait-and-signal pattern, spurious wakeups, and graceful close protocol.

item.title: Building an Limit Order Book in Python
item.description: An iterative walkthrough of building a limit order book, ground up.
